releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* #113: only add the logging path if it's filled by @msphair in https://github.com/loftTech/obsidian-oblogger/pull/115
* #64: combine rx and otc group settings by @msphair in https://github.com/loftTech/obsidian-oblogger/pull/116
* clean up some deprecated settings objects by @msphair in https://github.com/loftTech/obsidian-oblogger/pull/118
* #112: refactor containers into more organized folders by @msphair in https://github.com/loftTech/obsidian-oblogger/pull/117
* #112: extract callbacks into object by @msphair in https://github.com/loftTech/obsidian-oblogger/pull/120
* #112: create rx container by @msphair in https://github.com/loftTech/obsidian-oblogger/pull/121
* let the test vault update the core plugins migration file by @msphair in https://github.com/loftTech/obsidian-oblogger/pull/122
* changing default icon by @robotbrad in https://github.com/loftTech/obsidian-oblogger/pull/123
* #112: add group type by @msphair in https://github.com/loftTech/obsidian-oblogger/pull/124
* #112: create otc group container by @msphair in https://github.com/loftTech/obsidian-oblogger/pull/125
* #112: disconnect tag and otc by @msphair in https://github.com/loftTech/obsidian-oblogger/pull/126
* #112: property groups by @msphair in https://github.com/loftTech/obsidian-oblogger/pull/128
* removed added features from roadmap by @robotbrad in https://github.com/loftTech/obsidian-oblogger/pull/129
* style changes and fixes by @robotbrad in https://github.com/loftTech/obsidian-oblogger/pull/130
* warn about too new of settings by @msphair in https://github.com/loftTech/obsidian-oblogger/pull/132
* #135: file groups by @msphair in https://github.com/loftTech/obsidian-oblogger/pull/131
* #138: hide status icon in folder groups by @msphair in https://github.com/loftTech/obsidian-oblogger/pull/139
* added missing tool tips for all group types by @robotbrad in https://github.com/loftTech/obsidian-oblogger/pull/141
* change the collapse starting state by @robotbrad in https://github.com/loftTech/obsidian-oblogger/pull/143
* collapse all button by @robotbrad in https://github.com/loftTech/obsidian-oblogger/pull/145
* add optional accessors when initializing oblogger view by @msphair in https://github.com/loftTech/obsidian-oblogger/pull/146
* #134: combine groups by @msphair in https://github.com/loftTech/obsidian-oblogger/pull/147
* #53: avoid duplicate groups by @msphair in https://github.com/loftTech/obsidian-oblogger/pull/151
* #149: fallback to the vault name if the root folder is added by @msphair in https://github.com/loftTech/obsidian-oblogger/pull/152
* #198: normalize paths by @msphair in https://github.com/loftTech/obsidian-oblogger/pull/155
* adjusted margin between folders in sidebar by @robotbrad in https://github.com/loftTech/obsidian-oblogger/pull/156
* #157: disable features on mobile by @msphair in https://github.com/loftTech/obsidian-oblogger/pull/159
* add beta manifest for brat by @msphair in https://github.com/loftTech/obsidian-oblogger/pull/160
* fix mobile prompt by @msphair in https://github.com/loftTech/obsidian-oblogger/pull/162
* fix logging modal flicker by @msphair in https://github.com/loftTech/obsidian-oblogger/pull/163


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/loftTech/obsidian-oblogger/compare/0.8.6...0.9.2

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* #47: UI for excluding folders by @msphair in https://github.com/loftTech/obsidian-oblogger/pull/97
* #55: open in new leaf when ctrl/cmd is down by @msphair in https://github.com/loftTech/obsidian-oblogger/pull/98
* #28: be more careful with null values during logging by @msphair in https://github.com/loftTech/obsidian-oblogger/pull/99
* #60: try to be smarter about selecting tagged files by @msphair in https://github.com/loftTech/obsidian-oblogger/pull/100
* #101: refactor folder exclusions by @msphair in https://github.com/loftTech/obsidian-oblogger/pull/102
* changed oblogger icon by @robotbrad in https://github.com/loftTech/obsidian-oblogger/pull/104
* #63: new context menu by @msphair in https://github.com/loftTech/obsidian-oblogger/pull/108
* changed the wording of sort options in groups by @robotbrad in https://github.com/loftTech/obsidian-oblogger/pull/109
* hide close button in logger suggester when on desktop or tablet by @robotbrad in https://github.com/loftTech/obsidian-oblogger/pull/110


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/loftTech/obsidian-oblogger/compare/0.8.5...0.8.6

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* Update README.md by @msphair in https://github.com/loftTech/obsidian-oblogger/pull/84
* #86: fix auto refresh by @msphair in https://github.com/loftTech/obsidian-oblogger/pull/87
* hide vault name and clock by @robotbrad in https://github.com/loftTech/obsidian-oblogger/pull/88
* added option for hiding separators by @robotbrad in https://github.com/loftTech/obsidian-oblogger/pull/89
* prevented text in logger fields form clipping with icons by @robotbrad in https://github.com/loftTech/obsidian-oblogger/pull/90
* allow context-menu to render when called from a "skipped" note group by @robotbrad in https://github.com/loftTech/obsidian-oblogger/pull/93
* #91: use less brittle (but less feature rich) file context menu by @msphair in https://github.com/loftTech/obsidian-oblogger/pull/95


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/loftTech/obsidian-oblogger/compare/0.8.4...0.8.5

* adjusted div styles to better display hover by @robotbrad in https://github.com/loftTech/obsidian-oblogger/pull/36
* #34: put bookmarks on top by @msphair in https://github.com/loftTech/obsidian-oblogger/pull/35
* adjusted hover background color to better work with themes by @robotbrad in https://github.com/loftTech/obsidian-oblogger/pull/37
* use sort order for initial sorting by @msphair in https://github.com/loftTech/obsidian-oblogger/pull/38
* remove extra negative by @msphair in https://github.com/loftTech/obsidian-oblogger/pull/39
* added wiggle to vault name by @robotbrad in https://github.com/loftTech/obsidian-oblogger/pull/40
